notes: Venus reported Chainlink's LUNA feed hit a price floor threshold and was suspended at 0.107 USD
Venus said the spot price was about 0.01 USD around four hours after the feed suspension
Calculated as 0.107 divided by 0.01 using Venus's reported feed and spot values
Venus reported pausing the protocol at approximately 15:15 UTC using PauseGuardian via multisig
Venus reported about 14.2 million USD of shortfall across affected accounts after the initial tally
Venus said its 15 million USD risk fund would pay down the shortfall over time
Venus listed three suspicious addresses associated with large LUNA deposits
BeInCrypto reported two accounts deposited about 230 million LUNA during the desync event
BeInCrypto reported the deposited LUNA was valued at over 24 million USD at the stale Venus price
BeInCrypto reported borrowed assets totaling around 13.5 million USD
Halborn summarized Venus Finance's estimated loss at about 11.2 million USD
VIP-61 set LUNA and UST collateral factors to zero as part of offboarding
